title: Freshly Crispy Thai Ginger Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix, keto-friendly Thai dish featuring crispy vegetables and fresh ginger in a spicy sauce.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon sesame oil
ingredients.notes: For added flavor and to keep vegetables crispy

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup lime juice
ingredients.notes: Squeezed from fresh limes or lemons

ingredients.name: Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: To enhance flavors without overpowering the dish

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
ingredients.notes: Optional, for a bit of heat

instructions: Heat rapeseed oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add onion and garlic to the hot pan; sauté for about 1 minute until translucent.
Add bell peppers and broccoli. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, allowing vegetables to release some moisture.
Mix in lime juice, ginger, salt, and pepper. Continue stir-frying for an additional 2 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Fold in sesame oil last to ensure it coats the vegetables without making them soggy.
